calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-11-294767 The Alfred John O'Connor Revocable Trust and PTR-11-294830 The Martin Francis Schram Revocable Living Trust.

Both probate petitions in the Estate matter (PES-11-294526) were continued from October 16, 2013 to November 12, 2013 (a date after the mediation date of October 28, 2013) at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 at Counsels request. Mr. Dougherty represented to the Court that the Petition to Recover Monies in the Estate case was settled with the Cresta Heirs and requested that the matter be dropped. Said petition was taken off calendar at the request of the Petitioner (Mr. Dougherty). Mr. Vaught and Mr. Dougherty agree to the appointment of Dwayne Leonard as Temporary Trustee in the Schram Trust. The Court stated that no notice of the new proposed Trustee was given and directed Counsel to file an ex parte application for appointment of Mr. Leonard. The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee in the Schram Trust (294830) was continued to November 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee in the O'Connor Trust (294767) was granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-11-294526 Estate of Alfred John O'Connor; PTR-11-294767 Amendment and Restatement of Alfred John O'Connor Revocable Living Trust; PTR-11-294830 The Martin Francis Schram Revocable Living Trust

Appearances: Michael Dougherty for Douglas Johnson. Erica Shepard for Patricia Rice. Stacie Nelson for St. Jude Children's Research Foundation. Roger Gross (Special Administrator) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Shepard informed the Court that she filed a will contest this morning. Ms. Nelson stated that she will also be filing a will contest. All three matters were continued to September 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a referal to trial in Dept. 206, status on a referral to mediation and status on discovery.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Continued To Jun-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case numbers PES-11-294526 Estate of Alfred John O'Connor and
PTR-11-294767 The Alfred John O'Connor Trust.

Appearances: Erica Shepard for Patricia Rice. Colleen Coen for Michael Cresta, Robert Cresta, Jeffrey Cresta and Mimi Johnson. Michael Dougherty for Douglas Johnson. Aaron Cohn for Saint Jude. Roger Gross Special Administrator in Propria Persona.

Ms. Shepard respresented to the Court that she has authority to appear on Mr. Vaught's behalf. Mr. Dougherty stated that mediation has not occurred and that discovery still needs to be conducted. All Parties agreed to a continuance date of June 11, 2013 to report on mediation and possibly set the matter for trial. The Parties do not agree to the Court granting Mr. Gross additional authority. Mr. Gross explained that he is doing the banking, maintaining the property, receiving various distributions from the IRA accounts and that he did the tax returns for 2011. The Parties are to cooperate in exchanging information. All three matters were continued to June 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case numbers PES-11-294526 Estate of Alfred John O'Connor and PTR-11-294767 In Re Amendment and Restatement of Alfred John O'Connor Revocable Living Trust.

David Brillant for The Schram Family. Collenn Coen for The Crestas. Gerhard Stoll for Douglas Johnson (Petitioner/Respondent). Aaron Cohn for St. Jude Children's Research Hospital.

Counsel reported that they were ready to mediate and that Judge Gallagher has available dates in December. All matters were continued to January 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Trial Setting
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Vacated

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Continued To Oct-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-11-294767 The Alfred John O'Connor Revocable Trust and case number PES-11-294526 The Estate of Alfred John O'Connor.

Appearances: Gerhard Stoll and Edward Joy for Doug Johnson and Sidney Modell. Brian Carideo for Patricia Rice.

Mr. Stoll stated that discovery was ongoing, that some discovery has been served, that they have not met with Judge Gallagher and that they were not ready to mediate. The Petition for Probate Will and the Petition for Letters of Administration were continued to October 30, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation and setting for hearing. The August 28, 2012 hearing date is vacated.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Continued To Aug-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case numbers PTR-11-294767 The Alfred John O'Connor Revocable Trust and PES-11-294526 Estate of Alfred John O'Connor.

Appearances: Gerhard Stoll for Douglas Johnson. Brian Carideo for Patricia Rice.

Counsel reported that they reached an agreement with regard to selection of a Mediator (Judge Katherine Gallagher), that they need time to conduct/conclude discovery and stated that they have not discussed the issue of Mr. Gross having general powers. All three matters were continued to August 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery, mediation setting and the possibilty of limited authority with general powers to Mr. Gross.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Continued To May-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-11-294767 Amendment and Restatement of Alfred John O'Connor Revocable Living Trust and case number PES-11-294526 Estate of Alfred John O'Connor.

Appearances: Jon Vaught for Patricia Rice (Petitioner). Gary Royce for Objectors.

The Court noted that Mr. Stoll was not present. All matters were continued to May 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to discuss with Mr. Stoll the issue of extending general powers, the amount of bond, for the Parties to return to report on status of mediation, status on selecting a Mediator and status on apportionment of fees. Status of trial setting was set for August 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 in all three matters.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne/J. Gomez.

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Continued To May-01-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PTR-11-294767 The Alfred John O'Connor Trust and case number PTR-11-294526 Estate of Alfred O'Connor.

Appearances: Gary Royce for Cresta Family. David Brillant for Schram Family. Gerhard Stoll and Roger Gross for Douglas Johnson.

All matters were continued to May 1, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for completion of discovery and a referral to mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Continued To Jan-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Transferring Trust Assets Appointed To Douglas R. Johnson To The Trustee Of The First, For Damages, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Continued To Jan-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-11-294526 Estate of Alfredo John O'Connor.

Appearances: Gary Royce for the Cresta Siblings. Roger Gross for Douglas Johnson. Jon Vaught for Patricia Rice, Carol Burdette, Joanne Genevish, James Henderson and John Gerns.

All matters were continued January 11, to 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
